steps.title: Track the added measure
steps.content: The first sentence describes anti-counterfeiting measures Hartley used in the paper itself. The second sentence adds a separate protective step: stamping the notes with hard-to-copy sage leaf imprints. The transition must signal addition, not contrast or a narrowed example.

steps.title: Reject contrast and examples
steps.content: A signals a qualification, but the second sentence does not walk back the first. B and C would make the sage leaf imprints a specific example of weaving threads and muscovite into paper, which they are not. The answer is D.
